changeSet.author: dev
changeSet.comment: Widen orders.traffic_status from VARCHAR(20) to VARCHAR(50) to fit values introduced by the partial-refund feature: - PARTIAL_CANCELLED_BY_ADMIN (25 chars) - PARTIAL_CANCELLED_TIMEOUT (24 chars) Without this, admin-partial cancels failed with "value too long for type character varying(20)" and the whole refund transaction rolled back.
